answer:
Brex APIs utilize Bearer token authentication [1][2]. For standard client access, you generate a user token via the Brex dashboard (Settings > Developer) and pass it in the request header [1][2]. For partner integrations, Brex supports OAuth 2.0 via Authorization Code Grant or Client Credentials Grant flows to obtain access tokens [3].

In all cases, you must include the token in your API call headers as follows [1][2]:

```
Authorization: Bearer <your_token_here>
```

The production base URL for all API requests is https://api.brex.com [1][4].
